pre_game.message: Hey, I'm D. First time doing something like this? I gotta admit I'm pretty nervous about the whole thing, but also kind of excited to meet people here before we get started.

Yeah, first time for me too. I'm A. Honestly, I'm nervous as hell but I really need this—my family and I just got evicted and we're counting on winning here to get back on our feet. What brings you here?

Man, I hear you—that's rough. I lost a chunk of money in the stock market yesterday, so I'm really hoping to turn things around here too. We're both in a tough spot, but hey, at least we're here trying, right?

Yeah, exactly—we're both fighting to get out of a hole. Stock market losses, eviction... different situations but same desperation, you know? I just hope this game gives us both a real shot at fixing things.
For real, man. I'm not gonna lie—I'm counting on this too. Whatever happens in the game, I hope we both come out ahead. You've got this.
Thanks, man—I really appreciate that. Same to you. Let's both make this work.
Absolutely, we got this. Whatever happens in there, I'm rooting for you to get your family back on their feet.
That means a lot, D. Really. I'm rooting for you too—hope you get back what you lost. Let's both walk out of here with something good today.
Thanks, A. I really mean it—we're gonna do this. Your family's counting on you, and I'm not leaving here empty-handed either. Let's make it happen.
Answer_to_D_from_E: You got it, man. We're both gonna walk out of here with what we need. Good luck in there—I mean it.
You too, man. We got this. Let's both take care of what matters most to us out there.
